inputs.label: Battery Capacity (Ah)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal capacity of the battery in ampere-hours. Determines total energy storage.

inputs.label: Battery Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal voltage of the battery. Used to convert Ah to Wh.

inputs.label: Load Power (W)
inputs.businessContext: Total power consumption of the connected load in watts.

inputs.label: Depth of Discharge (DoD)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowed discharge percentage to prolong battery life. Typical values: Lead-acid 50%, Li-ion 80%.

inputs.label: Inverter Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the inverter converting DC to AC. Typical range 85-95%.

inputs.label: System Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall system efficiency including wiring losses, typically 90-98%.

inputs.label: Temperature Derating Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to adjust capacity for temperature. Below 25°C reduces capacity; above may increase slightly.

inputs.label: Aging Factor
inputs.businessContext: Capacity reduction due to battery age. New battery = 1, after cycles typically 0.8.

thresholds.depthOfDischarge > 80: High DoD may reduce battery cycle life significantly.
thresholds.inverterEfficiency < 85: Low inverter efficiency indicates potential energy waste.
thresholds.agingFactor < 0.7: Battery is near end of life; consider replacement.

suggestedActions: depthOfDischarge > 80 ? 'Reduce DoD to 50-80% for longer battery life' : ''

premiumFeatures: Trend analysis over time with historical data
Battery sizing recommendation based on runtime target
